data.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Decision engine gate evaluation complete. Gate 1 (No-Op): FAIL — behavioral changes to sprint orchestrator affect agent-facing rules. Gate 2 (User Impact): FAIL. Gate 3 (Architectural): PASS — new sprint self-healing checkpoints, two new scripts, two new contracts. Gate 4 (Constraint): PASS — new script names and contract paths agents must reference. Actions: CLAUDE.md suggested-change report + Living Reference update + ADR creation.
